figures.gloss: The movement's founder and sole authorized 'Speaker' (writing first as Anna Hayes) — a contactee who states she was inducted by the Guardian Alliance to translate the CDT-Plates for the 2000-2017 Stellar Activation Cycle. Her Voyagers volumes and the Azurite Press workshop transcripts constitute essentially the entire canon.
figures.facet: She rejects the label of channel: a Speaker does not lend her body to a foreign intelligence but 'translates' pre-encoded holographic records — a claim of textual authority framed as data transfer rather than possession.
figures.provenance: Ashayana Deane (Anna Hayes), 'Voyagers: The Sleeping Abductees' and 'Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti' (Granite Publishing, c. 1999-2002 editions); Azurite Press MCEO workshop materials.

figures.gloss: The task force of 'Guardian' races within the Interdimensional Association of Free Worlds — collectives such as the Elohei-Elohim, Seraphei-Seraphim, and Bra-ha-Rama, under the three founding Breneau Orders (Emerald, Gold, Amethyst) — charged with defending the 15-dimensional Time Matrix and shepherding Earth's ascension against 'fallen angelic' legions (Anunnaki, Drakonian).
figures.facet: It re-arms the angelic hierarchy as a cosmic security apparatus: guardianship here is not moral instruction but grid defense, fought over DNA templates and planetary star-gates rather than over souls.
figures.provenance: Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti; Azurite Press MCEO (Melchizedek Cloister Emerald Order) materials.

figures.gloss: The claimed pan-galactic co-evolution treaty administered by the Emerald Order: an agreement among Guardian collectives — open even to formerly fallen races willing to rehabilitate — to restore every being's original divine blueprint and reopen the way back to Source.
figures.facet: It turns soteriology into diplomacy: salvation is administered as a ratified interspecies treaty with signatories, defectors, and enforcement clauses, not as grace, sacrifice, or gnosis.
figures.provenance: Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti; Azurite Press MCEO workshop materials.

figures.gloss: Twelve indestructible holographic disc records said to long pre-date Atlantis, translated periodically by sanctioned Speakers. Deane's Voyagers books present themselves as the current translation — and all authentic world scriptures as earlier, partial, and progressively distorted ones.
figures.facet: A closed-loop authority device: every rival scripture is honored as a degraded excerpt of the plates, so no external text can contradict the tradition — revelation with the priority permanently reversed in its own favor.
figures.provenance: Voyagers I-II (Granite Publishing); Azurite Press MCEO materials on the CDT-Plate 'translations'.

figures.gloss: The primal catastrophe: the Turaneusiam, the angelic-human prototype race of the planet Tara, fell some 550 million years ago when their planetary grid was exploded, fragmenting their soul-essence into lower dimensional fields. Earth and its humans exist as the rescue architecture — the Sphere of Amenti — through which the fragments re-evolve and re-ascend.
figures.facet: It fuses the Gnostic fall with planetary science fiction: original sin becomes a grid-engineering accident, and reincarnation on Earth becomes a multi-million-year salvage operation.
figures.provenance: Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti (the Amenti rescue-mission narrative).

figures.gloss: The 2000-2017 window in which Earth's star-gates were said to open, and the practices keyed to it: Kathara grid healing and DNA-template 'stellar activations' meant to reassemble the twelve-strand silicate matrix and carry the activated through ascension.
figures.facet: Ascension as biotechnical procedure with a deadline: grace is replaced by frequency mechanics, and the apocalyptic date-window is survived, in practice, by rolling revisions of the schedule.
figures.provenance: Voyagers II; Kathara Bio-Spiritual Healing Program manuals (Azurite Press).

edges.note: Both administer Earth's evolution through a graded hierarchy of benevolent non-human intelligences; the Guardian material inherits the Theosophical brotherhood template but militarizes it into grid defense.
Deane's 'translation' of Guardian transmissions is received inner dictation in all but name — the tradition's own refusal of the channel label marks how close the mechanism runs.
Both recast the biblical Elohim as extraterrestrial actors: Raelism makes them humanity's laboratory creators, Voyagers splits them into guardian and fallen factions warring over the genome.

Deliberate modern borrowing of the emerald/Thoth emblem (via Doreal's 1939 'Emerald Tablets of Thoth', not the Greco-Egyptian corpus): Voyagers recasts Thoth's tablets as distorted excerpts of its own CDT-Plates — reinterpretation with the priority reversed, not descent.
Both begin with a pre-cosmic fall that fragments divine essence into lower worlds, making the material realm a rescue architecture rather than a home.

dossier.essence: Keylontic Science is the teaching corpus of the movement around Ashayana Deane (first published under the pen name Anna Hayes), whose Voyagers volumes (c. 1999–2002) and Azurite Press 'MCEO' workshops present her as the sole authorized Speaker translating the CDT-Plates — twelve claimed pre-Atlantean holographic records of which all world scriptures are held to be partial, distorted excerpts. A small, largely online following centered in the United States holds that a fifteen-dimensional Time Matrix, guardian and fallen extraterrestrial races, and the human DNA template form the true frame of history and salvation.
dossier.cosmos: Reality is a fifteen-dimensional Time Matrix administered by Guardian collectives under three founding Breneau Orders and bound by the Emerald Covenant, a pan-galactic treaty for restoring every being's original divine blueprint. Humanity descends from the Turaneusiam of the planet Tara, whose fall some 550 million years ago fragmented their soul-essence into lower dimensional fields; Earth and the Sphere of Amenti exist as the rescue architecture through which the fragments re-evolve. Death continues the multi-incarnational climb back through the dimensional fields toward re-ascension to Source, contested throughout by 'fallen angelic' races warring over the human genome.
dossier.practice: Practice is technique rather than worship: Kathara Bio-Spiritual Healing grid work and DNA-template 'stellar activations' aimed at reassembling a twelve-strand silicate matrix, keyed to the 2000–2017 Stellar Activation Cycle and transmitted through Azurite Press workshops, manuals, and recordings. There is no congregational institution beyond the workshop circuit and its online community; the teaching asks study, practice of the activation techniques, and alignment with the Emerald Covenant. The eschatological window has been survived, in practice, by rolling revisions of the schedule.
dossier.canon: The Voyagers volumes — 'Voyagers: The Sleeping Abductees' and 'Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti' — plus the Azurite Press MCEO workshop materials, all presented as current translations of the CDT-Plates.
dossier.reflects: The closed loop of total revelation — a system that honors every other scripture only as a corrupted excerpt of its own.
sources: Ashayana Deane (Anna Hayes), 'Voyagers: The Sleeping Abductees' (1999)
Ashayana Deane, 'Voyagers II: The Secrets of Amenti' (2002)
